name: Kiwi-Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Make pie crust by combining cracker crumbs, sugar, and butter. Press the crust mixture into a pie tin and refrigerate until ready to use.
Heat milk in the top of a double boiler over simmering water. Mix sugar with cornstarch and whisk into milk. Add lemon juice, zest, and vanilla and blend thoroughly. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell. Bake for 25 minutes in the middle of the oven or until set. Cool the pie for 10 minutes.
Melt marmalade over low heat and brush a thin layer over the surface of the pie. Arrange kiwis in an overlapping layer to cover the top of the pie completely. Brush with the remaining marmalade and cool before cutting.
